sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kevin O'Leary's WonderShyne Index Selects Real Game Used to Photo Match the Most Expensive Basketball Card Ever Sold
feed.summary: Medical Care Technologies Inc. announced that its subsidiary, Real Game Used (RGU), has been commissioned by Kevin O'Leary's WonderShyne Index to perform advanced photo-match authentication on the 2007-08 Upper Deck Exquisite Collection Michael Jordan & Kobe Bryant Dual Logoman Autograph card, the most expensive basketball card ever sold. RGU will utilize AI-assisted image analysis to identify the exact NBA games in which the jersey patches were worn. If successful, this could significantly increase the card's historical importance and valuation, which Kevin O'Leary already believes is worth millions more than its purchase price.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Purchases New Position in DexCom, Inc. $DXCM
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has initiated a new position in DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) by acquiring 50,185 shares valued at approximately $3.38 million during the third quarter. DexCom, a medical device company specializing in continuous glucose monitoring systems, reported strong Q3 results, beating analyst expectations with $0.61 EPS and $1.21 billion in revenue. Analyst ratings for DexCom are mixed but generally lean positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $86.30.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. Has $300,000 Stock Position in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. significantly reduced its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) by 90.5%, selling over 10,000 shares and retaining a position valued at $300,000. This comes as FactSet beat its Q3 earnings estimates and announced a $600 million share repurchase program. Analyst sentiment for FactSet remains mixed to negative, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and a target price of $313.

feed.title: Fortinet (FTNT) Enhances FortiCNAPP for Improved Cloud Risk Management
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) has significantly upgraded its FortiCNAPP solution to improve organizations' ability to assess and manage cloud risks by integrating various security factors into a unified workflow. The company demonstrates strong financial health with robust revenue growth, expanding margins, and stable financial ratios, reflected in high Altman Z-Score and Piotroski F-Score. Despite some insider selling, valuation metrics suggest the stock is trading near historical lows, potentially presenting investment opportunities, while institutional ownership remains strong.

feed.title: CH Robinson Worldwide Inc stock hits all-time high at 180.38 USD
feed.summary: CH Robinson Worldwide Inc (CHRW) stock has reached an all-time high of $180.38, surpassing its previous 52-week high. The logistics company has a market capitalization of $21.15 billion, with its stock up 66.91% over the past year. While the stock's RSI suggests it's in overbought territory and its P/E ratio of 35.85 indicates it's overvalued compared to its InvestingPro Fair Value, analysts have a positive outlook, citing productivity gains from AI implementations and an improved market position.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. Decreases Holdings in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. significantly reduced its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE:FDS) by 82.7%, selling 17,175 shares and retaining 3,599 shares valued at approximately $1.016 million. Despite FactSet beating quarterly earnings and revenue expectations and authorizing a $600 million share repurchase program, the stock holds a "Reduce" consensus rating from MarketBeat analysts, with multiple recent downgrades and significant insider selling. FactSet also announced a quarterly dividend, while its latest earnings report showed strong performance and issued FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Darden restaurants director Sonsteby sells $641k in stock
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants Inc (NYSE:DRI) director Charles M. Sonsteby sold 3,123 shares of common stock for approximately $641,209 on January 23, 2026. Following the sale, Sonsteby directly holds 19,351 shares. Darden, with a market cap of $22.62 billion, maintains a 3.05% dividend yield and has a history of consistent dividend payments.

feed.title: Hyatt (H) CFO Joan Bottarini Joins General Mills Board
feed.summary: Joan Bottarini, CFO of Hyatt (H), has been appointed to the board of directors of General Mills, effective January 26. The article then details Hyatt's market position as a prominent global hospitality player, its diverse portfolio of luxury brands, and its financial health. While Hyatt shows robust revenue growth, challenges in profitability, high leverage, and a distress zone Altman Z-Score are noted, suggesting potential risks despite a moderate buy sentiment from analysts.

feed.title: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. Has $1.13 Million Stake in IQVIA Holdings Inc. $IQV
feed.summary: Whittier Trust Co. of Nevada Inc. significantly reduced its stake in IQVIA Holdings Inc. by 90%, now holding 5,484 shares valued at approximately $1.13 million. Despite this, IQVIA outperformed earnings and revenue expectations for the last quarter, leading to strengthened analyst sentiment and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $251.06. Insider selling by Eric Sherbet was also reported, though institutional investors still own a substantial 89.62% of the stock.

feed.title: Meta signs deal to pay Corning up to $6 billion for fiber-optic cables, CNBC reports
feed.summary: Meta Platforms has reportedly signed a deal with Corning worth up to $6 billion through 2030 for fiber-optic cables to support its AI data centers. Corning expects AI hyperscalers like Meta, Amazon, Alphabet, and Microsoft to be its primary customers next year, driving significant growth and prompting an expansion of its cable factory in North Carolina. This agreement underscores Meta's aggressive investment in AI infrastructure despite recent challenges with its AI models.

feed.title: Brown & Brown stock hits 52-week low at $75.08
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. (BRO) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $75.08, representing a 24.19% decrease over the past year. This comes after the insurance brokerage company reported mixed Q4 2025 earnings, beating EPS expectations ($0.93 vs. $0.91) but missing revenue forecasts ($1.6 billion vs. $1.65 billion). The revenue shortfall is a key concern for investors, despite the earnings beat.

feed.title: Where Will Eli Lilly Be in 10 Years?
feed.summary: Eli Lilly is currently leading the GLP-1 weight loss drug market, which has driven its stock to a high valuation. However, the author cautions that the pharmaceutical industry operates on a cycle of patent exclusivity, and Eli Lilly's reliance on its GLP-1 drugs, Mounjaro and Zepbound, means it will eventually face competition and patent cliffs. The article suggests that investors should consider the long-term challenges, including competition from other drugmakers and the need for Eli Lilly to diversify its pipeline beyond GLP-1 drugs.

feed.title: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Pricing Look Interesting After Mixed Share Performance?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Brown & Brown (BRO) stock valuation using two common approaches: Excess Returns Analysis and Price vs. Earnings. While the Excess Returns model suggests the stock is 45.5% undervalued, its P/E ratio of 27.49x is above the industry average but below some peers, and is considered overvalued compared to Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 16.34x. The article highlights the importance of individual investor narratives for a more personalized valuation perspective.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Marks $100 Million of MedTech Products Donated Since 2020 to Help People Live, See and Smile
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson, supported by the J&J Foundation, has donated $100 million in MedTech products since 2020 to enhance access to specialized care globally. The company also plans an additional $20 million in 2026 for programs and impact investments to empower health workers in cardiovascular, vision, and surgical care. These efforts, part of the J&J CareCommunity platform, aim to build healthier communities by equipping health workers with necessary tools, training, and support through partnerships with various global organizations.

feed.title: John Deere reveals See & Spray Gen 2, updates for model year 2027 sprayers
feed.summary: John Deere is introducing See & Spray Gen 2, consolidating its precision herbicide application technology into a single platform for their 400 and 600 series sprayers. This update aims to help farmers reduce input costs by precisely applying herbicides, with previous models showing significant savings and increased yields. Additionally, John Deere is implementing several other enhancements for its model year 2027 sprayers, including improved lighting, faster speeds, enhanced camera systems, and better mobility options.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies stock hits 52-week high at 104.0 USD
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) stock reached a new 52-week high of $104.0, demonstrating strong recent momentum with gains of 10.11% in the past week and 22.18% over six months, despite a slight yearly decline. The company appears slightly undervalued with a "GOOD" financial health score and strong liquidity, supported by aggressive share buybacks. Ongoing analyst upgrades, strategic partnerships with Visa and NVIDIA, and FedRAMP High Ready status further underscore Akamai's potential for sustained growth in the evolving technology landscape.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Raises Stock Holdings in Invesco Ltd. $IVZ
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in Invesco Ltd. by 36.8% in Q3, now owning 176,296 shares valued at $4.249 million. Analysts generally rate Invesco as a "Hold" with a target price of $26.42, although Deutsche Bank recently upgraded it to "Buy" with a $31 target. Invesco has shown strong performance, beating recent EPS estimates and reporting a 6.1% increase in revenue year-over-year, with its shares trading near a 52-week high.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. $ISRG Shares Sold by J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG
feed.summary: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG significantly reduced its stake in Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) by 38.6% in the third quarter, selling over 17,000 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group and State Street Corp increased their holdings. The article also notes recent analyst ratings ranging from "Strong Buy" to "Sell," insider selling activity, and the company's strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $4.24 Million Stock Position in International Paper Company $IP
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly reduced its stake in International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) by 85% in Q3, now holding 92,273 shares valued at approximately $4.24 million. This comes as an insider, SVP Clay R. Ellis, also sold 18,819 shares for over $693,000, with insiders holding only 0.55% of the company. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and an average target price of $49.07, despite some recent upgrades and downgrades.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Purchases 36,037 Shares of Fortive Corporation $FTV
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Fortive Corporation by 96.4% in Q3, acquiring an additional 36,037 shares, bringing its total holdings to 73,423 shares valued at approximately $3.60 million. Other institutional investors also raised their positions in Fortive, with hedge funds and institutions collectively owning about 94.94% of the company's stock. Analysts currently hold an average "Hold" rating for Fortive with a mean price target of $57.77, following the company's recent beat on quarterly EPS estimates and its FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Purchases 21,833 Shares of DTE Energy Company $DTE
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) by 532.8%, acquiring an additional 21,833 shares and now holding 25,931 shares valued at approximately $3.667 million. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for DTE with an average price target of $147.38. DTE Energy has also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.165 per share and provided positive EPS guidance for fiscal years 2025 and 2026.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Sells 28,011 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC significantly reduced its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) by 36.2% in the third quarter, selling 28,011 shares and retaining 49,281 shares valued at approximately $4.44 million. Despite this trimming, other major institutions like Norges Bank and Thrivent Financial for Lutherans increased their holdings, leading to institutional investors owning 86.60% of the company's stock. Church & Dwight recently surpassed Q3 earnings estimates, reporting $0.81 EPS against an estimated $0.73, and has a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $98.65.

feed.title: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG Purchases 142,929 Shares of Arch Capital Group Ltd. $ACGL
feed.summary: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG significantly increased its stake in Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:ACGL) by 100.4%, purchasing an additional 142,929 shares, bringing its total to 285,340 shares valued at $25.89 million. Other institutional investors also made large moves in ACGL stock, with various firms increasing their positions and some insiders selling shares. Analyst ratings for Arch Capital Group currently show a consensus "Hold" with an average target price of $107.53.

feed.title: Chipotle doubling pace of 'new product launches,' chicken al pastor returning
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is bringing back its popular chicken al pastor for a limited time, signaling an aggressive new menu strategy for 2026. The company plans to double its usual pace of product launches, introducing three to four new protein offerings alongside sides and dips to drive transaction growth. Chicken al pastor will return to restaurants in multiple countries on February 10, with early access for Rewards members.

feed.title: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG Purchases 32,583 Shares of First Solar, Inc. $FSLR
feed.summary: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG increased its stake in First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) by 56.3% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 32,583 shares and now owning 90,442 shares valued at $19.95 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company, which saw insiders selling over $12.9 million worth of stock in the last three months. First Solar reported mixed Q3 earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue forecasts, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: BD to Announce Financial Results for its First Quarter of Fiscal 2026
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced it will host an audio webcast on Monday, February 9, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on December 31, 2025. The company will also provide an update on its operations and strategy during the webcast. Financial information and related presentation materials will be available on BD's investor relations website.

feed.title: Waters Parkerson & CO. LLC Sells 3,835 Shares of JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM
feed.summary: Waters Parkerson & CO. LLC reduced its stake in JPMorgan Chase & Co. by 1.1% in Q3, selling 3,835 shares and now holding 347,486 shares worth $109.6 million. JPMorgan Chase & Co. reported Q4 EPS of $5.23 on $46.77 billion revenue and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share. Insiders sold 15,834 shares of the company's stock in the last three months, though analysts have a mixed view with a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: BD carves out biosciences arm, $4B Waters deal nears Feb. 9
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced that it has set February 5, 2026, as the record date for the spin-off of its Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions business. This spun-off entity will then combine with Waters Corporation via a Reverse Morris Trust on February 9, 2026. Under the terms, BD will receive $4 billion in cash, and BD shareholders will own 39.2% of the combined company, with existing Waters shareholders holding 60.8%.

feed.title: 99% of Waters investors endorse BD biosciences combination
feed.summary: Waters Corporation shareholders have overwhelmingly approved (approximately 99%) the issuance of Waters common stock for the proposed combination of BD's Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions business with Waters. Both companies have secured all necessary regulatory approvals and a favorable IRS Private Letter Ruling, with the transaction expected to close on February 9, 2026. Waters will also release its Q4 2025 financial results on the same day.

feed.title: DigitalOcean (DOCN) Hits 52-Week High After Analyst Boost & AI Performance Gains - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Shares of cloud computing platform DigitalOcean (NYSE:DOCN) surged 10.5% after an analyst raised its price target from $55 to $60 and the company announced significant performance improvements on its AI platform, doubling production throughput and halving costs for a client. The company also appointed Vinay Kumar as its Chief Product and Technology Officer, signaling progress in expanding its AI cloud offerings. Following these developments, DigitalOcean's stock reached a new 52-week high of $59.85 per share, representing a 22.2% gain since the start of the year.

feed.title: Invesco's (NYSE:IVZ) Q4 CY2025 Sales Beat Estimates, Stock Soars
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) reported Q4 CY2025 revenue of $1.26 billion, surpassing Wall Street estimates by 1.1% with an 8.8% year-on-year increase. The company also beat EPS estimates, with non-GAAP profit of $0.62 per share, and its Assets Under Management reached $2.2 trillion, beating analyst expectations. Despite mixed longer-term revenue growth, the solid quarterly results led to a stock price increase of 5.6%.

feed.title: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG Purchases 2,648 Shares of Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. $TMO
feed.summary: J. Safra Sarasin Holding AG increased its stake in Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. by 10.1% in Q3, purchasing an additional 2,648 shares and bringing their total holdings to 28,827 shares valued at $13.98 million. Other institutional investors also made significant moves, with Norges Bank and Soundwatch Capital LLC acquiring large new stakes. The article also details recent insider stock sales, financial metrics, and reiterates analyst ratings for Thermo Fisher Scientific.

feed.title: 3 Robotics Stocks Animating Markets With Ample Upside to Go
feed.summary: The robotics industry is projected for significant growth in the next five years, driven by advancements in AI and increased defense and industrial spending. This article highlights three robotics stocks—Teledyne (TDY), Teradyne (TER), and Kraken Robotics (KRKNF)—that are poised for substantial upside. Teledyne benefits from strong Q4 2025 results and a focus on unmanned systems, Teradyne's diversified business with a strong robotics segment shows robust analyst trends, and Kraken Robotics, specializing in undersea vehicles, anticipates a potential TSX listing to boost visibility and institutional support.

feed.title: Sysco Delivers Solid Q2 Performance, Driven by Volume Growth and Margin Expansion, Raises Outlook
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. reported strong financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, with a 3.0% increase in sales to $20.8 billion year-over-year. The company achieved a gross profit of $3.8 billion, a 3.9% increase, and expanded its gross margin to 18.3%, attributing this success to improved volume, margin expansion, and strategic growth initiatives. These positive outcomes have led Sysco to raise its financial outlook.

feed.title: Food distributor Sysco lifts annual profit forecast on robust U.S. business
feed.summary: Sysco has increased its annual profit forecast and surpassed second-quarter profit and sales estimates due to strong demand for its products and a recovering U.S. business. The company benefited from robust customer visits to restaurants and improved demand for U.S. foodservice offerings, especially from higher-income Americans. Additionally, cost-cutting measures and strong international business performance contributed to its positive financial results.

feed.title: Amazon Quality Champion
feed.summary: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) topped the Online Retailer category in the American Customer Satisfaction Survey's 2026 Retail and Consumer Shipping Study, scoring 82 in the Online Multimarket category. The company, which is significantly larger than its online rivals in terms of revenue, plans to further improve its operating income for e-commerce by reducing its human workforce through increased robotic automation. Amazon aims to combine strong customer service with better industry margins by enhancing its workforce-to-revenue ratio.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market update + Block Exceeds $200 Billion in Credit Provided to Its Users
feed.summary: The NYSE provided a pre-market update on January 27, 2026, noting that U.S. equities are higher as earnings season progresses, with Boeing and Northrop Grumman reporting and Apple and Meta expected later in the week. Additionally, Block announced it has extended over $200 billion in credit to its users through Cash App Borrow, Afterpay, and Square Loans, with further discussion anticipated on NYSE Live. IAB CEO David Cohen also joined from the NYSE floor to mark the group's 30th anniversary.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald initiates Paychex stock coverage with Underweight rating
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald initiated coverage on Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) with an "Underweight" rating and a $98.00 price target, citing concerns about its organic top-line growth due to intense competition and macroeconomic pressures. Despite these concerns, Paychex has demonstrated strong revenue growth, high gross profit margins, and a history of consistent dividend payments, operating with a moderate debt level. The firm's price target is based on a 2027 EPS estimate and a discounted cash flow analysis, highlighting the stock's recent 27.55% decline over six months.

feed.title: Argus raises Monster Beverage stock price target to $95 on growth outlook
feed.summary: Argus has raised its price target for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) to $95.00 from $90.00, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong domestic and international growth potential. The firm highlighted Monster's impressive five-year compound annual sales and EPS growth rates of 13%-15%, a clean balance sheet, and a focus on the rapidly expanding energy drink segment. Other analysts from Morgan Stanley, Stifel, Piper Sandler, and Wells Fargo have also recently increased their price targets for Monster, reinforcing a positive outlook for the company.

feed.title: Booking Holdings price target lowered to $5,920 by Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) to $5,920 from $6,050, while maintaining a Neutral rating despite the travel company's strong third-quarter performance. The company exceeded expectations in gross bookings, room nights, and revenue, showing growth in alternative accommodations and across all regions. InvestingPro data highlights Booking's impressive gross profit margin of 86.99% and revenue of $26.04 billion, with year-over-year growth, and assesses its financial health as "GREAT."

feed.title: Western Alliance Bancorporation (NYSE:WAL) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.18 EPS
feed.summary: Western Alliance Bancorporation (NYSE:WAL) reported stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings, with an EPS of $2.59, surpassing analyst estimates by $0.18. The financial services provider's revenue also beat expectations, reaching $913.50 million, and its quarterly revenue increased by 17.0% year-over-year. Additionally, the company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.42 per share, representing a $1.68 annualized dividend.

feed.title: CACI Secures $250 Million Task Order for U.S. Army Spectrum Dominance
feed.summary: CACI International has secured a five-year task order worth up to $250 million to enhance the U.S. Army's spectrum dominance capabilities. This contract, highlighting CACI's strong position in defense technology, is expected to boost future business development and has led the company to raise its 2026 free cash flow guidance and revenue growth expectations. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook on CACI's stock, with an average 1-year price target of $663.13.

feed.title: F5, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Data Breach and 24% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is reminding investors of F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) who suffered substantial losses that they have until February 17, 2026, to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit. This action follows a 24% decline in F5's stock price after the company disclosed significantly below-market growth expectations for fiscal 2026, including reductions to sales and renewals and increased expenses, partly due to a security breach involving its BIG-IP product. Investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are affected.

feed.title: Tenable Extends Exposure Management to AI Attack Surface
feed.summary: Tenable has announced the general availability of Tenable One AI Exposure, extending its exposure management platform to the AI attack surface. This new offering unifies AI discovery, protection, and governance, providing organizations with unified visibility and contextualized insights into AI usage across their environments. The platform aims to help security teams identify, prioritize, and reduce AI-related risks, addressing the "AI Exposure Gap" that many organizations face due to a lack of visibility into their AI deployments.

feed.title: F5, INC. (NASDAQ: FFIV) DEADLINE ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Reminds F5, Inc. Investors of Upcoming Deadline
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a deadline alert for investors of F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV), reminding them of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, are encouraged to inquire about their legal rights and options by February 17, 2026, to potentially serve as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that F5 made misrepresentations regarding its security capabilities.

feed.title: Hi Marley Appoints Verisk's Scott Stephenson to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Hi Marley, a company specializing in intelligent conversational platforms for the P&C insurance industry, has appointed Scott G. Stephenson, formerly of Verisk Analytics, to its Board of Directors. Stephenson, known for his leadership at Verisk where he significantly grew the company's market cap and helped it earn various accolades, will bring expertise in scaling high-growth companies and applying data science with AI in the insurance sector. His appointment is expected to support Hi Marley's growth, particularly in expanding its AI-driven solutions across the enterprise and strengthening its customer-centric culture.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company to Release Q4 and Full-Year Financial Results
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (GPC) is set to release its Q4 and full-year financial results on February 17, 2026, followed by a conference call and available webcast. The company, a leading global provider of automotive and industrial replacement parts, is expected to provide key performance metrics and future outlook. According to Wall Street analysts, GPC has an average 1-year price target of $148.67, with recent upgrades and positive ratings from firms like Goldman Sachs, Truist, and Evercore ISI, citing improving trends in both automotive and industrial segments.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald initiates ADP stock coverage with Overweight rating
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has initiated coverage on Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) with an Overweight rating and a price target of $306.00, suggesting an 18.5% upside. The firm highlights ADP's shift towards human capital management and professional employer organization services as key growth drivers. Despite current macro concerns and AI-related pressures, ADP's valuation is considered attractive with a P/E multiple nearing a 10-year low, and the company has a strong track record of dividend increases and a "GOOD" financial health score.

feed.title: Truist Financial Issues $1.25 Billion in Medium-Term Notes
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation issued $1.25 billion in medium-term notes on January 27, 2026, with a fixed-to-floating rate of 4.597% and a maturity in 2032. Concurrently, Truist Bank issued $1.25 billion in senior bank notes due 2029 and an additional $350 million in floating rate notes. These issuances were registered under the Securities Act of 1933 via Form S-3.

feed.title: Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW Stock Holdings Lifted by Maj Invest Holding A S
feed.summary: Maj Invest Holding A S increased its stake in Lowe's Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) by 15.7% in the third quarter, making it their fifth-largest holding. Lowe's reported Q3 EPS of $3.06, surpassing estimates, with revenue slightly below expectations but showing a 3.2% year-over-year increase. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.20, while CEO Marvin R. Ellison sold 18,000 shares, decreasing his ownership by 7.23%.
